chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6444 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.28631/2019 2. For hearing of main case 18.12.2024 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Vide order dated10.10.2019, the provisional release was ordered subject to the determination of the relevant appeal before the Customs Appellate Tribunal. It is jointly stated that this petition be disposed of and fate of the security be subject to the outcome of the aforesaid appeal. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
